NOTICE OF COURT HEARING (ELDER OR DEPENDENT ADULT ABUSE)
Off Calendar Jul-11-2012 Denied
MINI MINUTES: All parties were sworn prior to the commencement of the proceedings.

Appearances: Juchu Tsao (Petitioner in Pro Per). Yu Ling Chao (Respondent in Pro Per). Yongmei Liu (Mandarin Interpreter for the Petitioner).

The Court hears testimony, receives evidence and after hearing the evidence presented, the Court DENIED the requests for the reasons set forth on the record. The is not a procedure to enforce house rules or house drawing. Case is dismissed.

Judge: Peter Busch. Court Reporter: Susan Cruzier CSR #4761. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy Santiago.
